description: NextAuth.js (now part of Auth.js/Better Auth) is an open-source authentication library for Next.js and other JavaScript web frameworks. It helps application developers add sign-in, session handling, and provider-based authentication to their own apps.
summary: nextauth.com documents one developer integration surface: a self-hosted REST API mounted inside each integrating app at `/api/auth`; no public NextAuth-owned API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI surface on nextauth.com itself was found.
